All 15 files are created — 1,002 lines total. Here's a summary of the new **PulseBoard** channel plugin:

## Files Created (`extensions/pulseboard/`)

### Root-level files (following the standard extension pattern)
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Plugin metadata, peer deps, channel config (id, label, blurb, install spec) |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest (id `pulseboard`, channels `["pulseboard"]`) |
| `index.ts` | Main entry — `defineChannelPluginEntry()` with id, name, plugin, and `setRuntime` |
| `setup-entry.ts` | Setup-only entry — `defineSetupPluginEntry(pulseboardPlugin)` |
| `api.ts` | Public API barrel — re-exports from `runtime-api.ts` |
| `runtime-api.ts` | Runtime barrel — re-exports types/helpers from granular `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths |
| `setup-api.ts` | Setup exports — `pulseboardSetupAdapter` and `pulseboardSetupWizard` |
| `test-api.ts` | Test helper — exports `pulseboardPlugin` |

### `src/` implementation files
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `channel.ts` | Core plugin via `createChatChannelPlugin()` — supports **both `direct` and `group` chat types**, DM security (pairing/allowlist/open/disabled), config adapter, status adapter, gateway `startAccount`, and outbound with **4000-char text chunk limit** |
| `config-schema.ts` | Zod schemas — `PulseboardConfigSchema` with `apiToken`, `serverUrl`, `username`, `boards`, `dmPolicy`, `groupPolicy`, `allowFrom`, `markdown` |
| `types.ts` | `PulseboardAccountConfig` and `ResolvedPulseboardAccount` interfaces, plus account resolution helpers (`list`, `resolveDefault`, `resolve`) |
| `normalize.ts` | Target normalization — usernames (lowercase) and board names (`#`-prefixed), `looksLikePulseboardTargetId`, `normalizePulseboardAllowEntry` |
| `runtime.ts` | Runtime store via `createPluginRuntimeStore<PluginRuntime>()` |
| `send.ts` | Outbound message delivery stub (boards vs DMs, returns synthetic message IDs) |
| `setup-surface.ts` | Full setup wizard with API token credential, server URL text input, board names text input, DM policy, env-var shortcut (`PULSEBOARD_API_TOKEN`), and validation |

### Key design choices
- **Chat types**: `["direct", "group"]` — DMs to usernames, group messages to `#board-name` targets
- **Text chunk limit**: 4,000 characters (as specified)
- **All imports** use `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` subpaths (no core `src/**` imports)
- **No existing files modified** — everything is self-contained in `extensions/pulseboard/`
